result.stdout:
USAGE:
    apiposture-pro [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro scan .
    apiposture-pro scan ./src/MyApi
    apiposture-pro scan . --output json --output-file report.json
    apiposture-pro scan . --fail-on high
    apiposture-pro diff baseline.json current.json

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    scan                                  Scan ASP.NET Core API project with Pro
                                          rules                                 
    diff <baseline> <current>             Compare two scan results to identify  
                                          security posture changes              
    history                               View and manage historical scan       
                                          records                               
    compliance report                     Generate a compliance report          
                                          (enterprise)                          
    compliance starter-kit <framework>    Emit starter kit files (enterprise)   
    verify                                Verify scan record integrity          
                                          (enterprise)                          
    activate <key>                        Activate ApiPosture Pro license       
    deactivate                            Deactivate the current license        
    status                                Show license status and installed     
                                          extensions

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Activate ApiPosture Pro license

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro activate <key> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro activate XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX

ARGUMENTS:
    <key>    The license key to activate

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Compare two scan results to identify security posture changes

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro diff <baseline> <current> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro diff baseline.json current.json
    apiposture-pro diff --format json baseline.json current.json
    apiposture-pro diff --summary-only baseline.json current.json

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseline>    Path to baseline scan result (JSON)
    <current>     Path to current scan result (JSON) 

OPTIONS:
                          DEFAULT                                 
    -h, --help                       Prints help information      
    -v, --version                    Prints version information   
    -f, --format          console    Output format (console, json)
    -o, --output                     Output file path (optional)  
        --summary-only               Show only summary

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Compare two scan results to identify security posture changes

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro diff <baseline> <current> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro diff baseline.json current.json
    apiposture-pro diff --format json baseline.json current.json
    apiposture-pro diff --summary-only baseline.json current.json

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseline>    Path to baseline scan result (JSON)
    <current>     Path to current scan result (JSON) 

OPTIONS:
                          DEFAULT                                 
    -h, --help                       Prints help information      
    -v, --version                    Prints version information   
    -f, --format          console    Output format (console, json)
    -o, --output                     Output file path (optional)  
        --summary-only               Show only summary

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
View and manage historical scan records

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro history [subcommand] [id] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro history list
    apiposture-pro history list -p /path/to/project
    apiposture-pro history show abc123
    apiposture-pro history trend -p /path/to/project
    apiposture-pro history cleanup --days 90

ARGUMENTS:
    [subcommand]    Subcommand: list, show, trend, cleanup
    [id]            Scan ID (for show subcommand)         

OPTIONS:
                         DEFAULT                                      
    -h, --help                      Prints help information           
    -v, --version                   Prints version information        
    -p, --path                      Filter by scanned path            
    -b, --branch                    Filter by Git branch              
    -l, --limit          20         Maximum records to show           
    -d, --days           30         Number of days (for trend/cleanup)
    -f, --format         console    Output format (console, json)     
    -o, --output-file               Output file path

commands.payload:

ARGUMENTS:

    [id]            Scan ID (for show subcommand)

    -v, --version                   Prints version information        
    -p, --path                      Filter by scanned path            
    -b, --branch                    Filter by Git branch              
    -l, --limit          20         Maximum records to show           
    -d, --days           30         Number of days (for trend/cleanup)
    -f, --format         console    Output format (console, json)     
    -o, --output-file               Output file path

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Scan ASP.NET Core API project with Pro rules

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro scan [path] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro scan .
    apiposture-pro scan ./src/MyApi
    apiposture-pro scan . --output json --output-file report.json
    apiposture-pro scan . --fail-on high

ARGUMENTS:
    [path]    Path to the project or directory to scan

OPTIONS:
                               DEFAULT                                          
    -h, --help                             Prints help information              
    -v, --version                          Prints version information           
    -o, --output               terminal    Output format (terminal, json,       
                                           markdown)                            
    -f, --output-file                      Output file path                     
    -c, --config                           Path to configuration file           
                                           (.apiposture.json)                   
        --severity             info        Minimum severity to report (info,    
                                           low, medium, high, critical)         
        --fail-on                          Fail with exit code 1 if findings at 
                                           or above this severity               
        --sort-by                          Sort by field (severity, route,      
                                           method, classification, controller,  
                                           location)                            
        --sort-dir             desc        Sort direction (asc, desc)           
        --classification                   Filter by security classification    
                                           (public, authenticated,              
                                           role-restricted, policy-restricted)  
        --method                           Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST,    
                                           PUT, DELETE, PATCH)                  
        --route-contains                   Filter routes containing substring   
                                           (case-insensitive)                   
        --controller                       Filter by controller name            
        --api-style                        Filter by API style (controller,     
                                           minimal)                             
        --rule                             Filter by rule ID (AP001, AP002,     
                                           etc.)                                
        --group-by                         Group endpoints by field (controller,
                                           classification, severity, method)    
        --group-findings-by                Group findings by field (severity,   
                                           controller, classification)          
        --no-color                         Disable colored output               
        --no-icons                         Disable icons/emojis in output       
        --operator                         Operator/organization name embedded  
                                           in scan record                       
        --comp-framework                   Compliance framework context: soc2 | 
                                           iso27001 | all

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Scan ASP.NET Core API project with Pro rules

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro scan [path] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro scan .
    apiposture-pro scan ./src/MyApi
    apiposture-pro scan . --output json --output-file report.json
    apiposture-pro scan . --fail-on high

ARGUMENTS:
    [path]    Path to the project or directory to scan

OPTIONS:
                               DEFAULT                                          
    -h, --help                             Prints help information              
    -v, --version                          Prints version information           
    -o, --output               terminal    Output format (terminal, json,       
                                           markdown)                            
    -f, --output-file                      Output file path                     
    -c, --config                           Path to configuration file           
                                           (.apiposture.json)                   
        --severity             info        Minimum severity to report (info,    
                                           low, medium, high, critical)         
        --fail-on                          Fail with exit code 1 if findings at 
                                           or above this severity               
        --sort-by                          Sort by field (severity, route,      
                                           method, classification, controller,  
                                           location)                            
        --sort-dir             desc        Sort direction (asc, desc)           
        --classification                   Filter by security classification    
                                           (public, authenticated,              
                                           role-restricted, policy-restricted)  
        --method                           Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST,    
                                           PUT, DELETE, PATCH)                  
        --route-contains                   Filter routes containing substring   
                                           (case-insensitive)                   
        --controller                       Filter by controller name            
        --api-style                        Filter by API style (controller,     
                                           minimal)                             
        --rule                             Filter by rule ID (AP001, AP002,     
                                           etc.)                                
        --group-by                         Group endpoints by field (controller,
                                           classification, severity, method)    
        --group-findings-by                Group findings by field (severity,   
                                           controller, classification)          
        --no-color                         Disable colored output               
        --no-icons                         Disable icons/emojis in output       
        --operator                         Operator/organization name embedded  
                                           in scan record                       
        --comp-framework                   Compliance framework context: soc2 | 
                                           iso27001 | all

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Verify scan record integrity (enterprise)

USAGE:
    apiposture-pro verify [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    apiposture-pro verify
    apiposture-pro verify --scan-id abc123def456

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                                    
    -v, --version    Prints version information                                 
        --scan-id    Scan record ID to verify (default: latest for current      
                     directory)
